commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor browser proof plus maintainer/security review of the scoped-plugin cookie-prefix fix; do not send to the repair lane while external real behavior proof is insufficient.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete cross-plugin auth boundary issue for scoped plugin IDs.; Review finding: [P1] Bind session cookies to the full plugin path — src/gateway/plugin-ui-entry-launch-tokens.ts:66-71 (sha=59f2bb41fc68d8a1578bbab1572f3c5712df2beb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds plugin-owned Control UI entry point registration, gateway listing and launch-token/session-cookie auth, Control UI navigation/iframe rendering, SDK docs, tests, and generated Swift protocol models.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking finding: current source supports scoped plugin IDs, while the PR derives the new session prefix from only the first /plugins/ path segment. A focused regression would launch /plugins/@team/one/ and assert the resulting cookie cannot authenticate /plugins/@team/two/.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor browser proof plus maintainer/security review of the scoped-plugin cookie-prefix fix; do not send to the repair lane while external real behavior proof is insufficient.
